vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:warp-oz
vBRIEFInfo.description: Comprehensive OpenAPI 3.1 spec and Swagger UI for the DEFT Evolution CRM REST API

items.title: Create api/openapi.yaml — full OpenAPI 3.1 spec covering all 100+ endpoints

narrative.Approach: Hand-written YAML derived from router, models, and DTOs. Covers all paths, schemas, enums, auth, pagination, and RFC 7807 errors.

items.title: Create api/internal/docs/docs.go — embed spec + serve Swagger UI

narrative.Approach: Go embed directive to bundle openapi.yaml; single HTML page loads Swagger UI from CDN. No external Go dependency.

items.title: Build and validate — task go:build compiles with embedded spec
